faqs.q: Can I switch to the annual plan?
faqs.a: Yes, you can switch from a monthly plan to an annual plan at any time. You immediately earn 2 months free.

faqs.q: What happens after the trial period ends?
faqs.a: After the 14-day trial period, your account is suspended. Your data is kept for 30 days.

faqs.q: Can I get a corporate invoice?
faqs.a: Yes. During payment, select the corporate invoice option and enter your company details.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your domain, select your country and target language. Automatic technical scan completes in 5 minutes.

howItWorks.step3Desc: Accelerate your organic growth with AI content suggestions, backlink opportunities and outreach campaigns.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to your questions are here
faq.q0: Which search engines does FunBreak SEO support?
faq.a0: We provide technical SEO and rank tracking for Google, Bing, and Yandex. GEO features cover ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews and Google AI Mode.
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card for the free trial?
faq.a1: No. No credit card is required for the 14-day free trial. You'll receive a reminder when the trial ends and can upgrade to any plan.
faq.q2: How does the GEO / AI Visibility feature work?
faq.a2: We create prompts specific to your industry and brand, send them to platforms like ChatGPT and Gemini at regular intervals, and analyze the responses. We measure how often your brand is mentioned and cited as a source.
faq.q3: Are my Backlink Market orders safe?
faq.a3: Yes. We use an escrow system: payment is held on the platform first, then released to the publisher after the link is live and verified. We offer a refund guarantee for any issues.
faq.q4: I'm an agency. Can I manage my clients on the platform?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Growth and higher plans include multi-project management, white-label reports and team member invitations. The Enterprise plan also offers a dedicated account manager.
faq.a5: Your data is stored encrypted (AES-256) on servers in Turkey. We fully comply with KVKK and GDPR. We never sell your data to third parties.
faq.a6: We offer individual and corporate invoice options. All invoices are generated as downloadable PDF files on the platform.
faq.q7: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faq.a7: Yes, you can cancel at any time. After cancellation, you'll retain access until the end of the current period.

seoPage.title: What is SEO?
seoPage.subtitle: The complete set of technical, content, and authority strategies you apply to rank higher in Google and other search engines. In 2025, SEO works together with AI searches (GEO).

stats.label: Estimated share of all web traffic coming from organic search

Number of factors in Google's ranking algorithm

technical.title: Technical SEO
technical.desc: Site speed, Core Web Vitals, crawl budget, hreflang, structured data and mobile compatibility. The foundation for search engines to correctly crawl and index your site.

content.title: Content Optimization
content.desc: E-E-A-T compliant content production targeting keywords, title optimization, meta descriptions, and internal linking strategy.

offpage.title: Off-Page SEO & Backlinks
offpage.desc: Quality backlink profile that increases authority and trust score. Domain Rating (DR), anchor text distribution, and link diversity.

local.title: Local & International SEO
local.desc: Google Business profile, local keywords, hreflang tags, and multilingual content strategy to go global.

analytics.title: SEO Analytics & Measurement
analytics.desc: Organic traffic, ranking changes, CTR optimization, and ROI measurement. Data-driven decisions with Google Search Console and FunBreak SEO dashboard.

geo.title: SEO + GEO Integration
geo.desc: In 2025, Google alone is not enough. Manage GEO strategy alongside SEO to rank on ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.

seoPage.howBody: Google crawls billions of web pages every day, indexes their content, and ranks the most relevant pages for user queries by evaluating 200+ factors. SEO is the process of understanding these factors and optimizing your site in a way that search engines and users prefer.
seoPage.whyBody: Organic search accounts for 68% of all web traffic and doesn't stop when a campaign budget runs out, unlike paid ads. A well-optimized site continues to receive quality traffic at low cost for years. The page ranked #1 in Google gets an average CTR of 27.6%, while the #10 page gets only 2.4%.
seoPage.changedBody: With the rise of AI-based search tools, SEO alone is no longer sufficient. Platforms like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity answer millions of queries and choose whether to recommend brands on their own. In this new environment, applying GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) together with SEO has become critical.
seoPage.ctaTitle: Learn Your Site's SEO Score for Free
seoPage.ctaSubtitle: See where your site stands in 5 minutes with 150+ technical checks, Core Web Vitals analysis, and prioritized action list.

geoPage.title: Stand Out in
geoPage.subtitle: 40% of users now use ChatGPT and Gemini instead of Google. Reach these audiences with GEO (Generative Engine Optimization).
geoPage.whatBody: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) is the set of optimization strategies applied to ensure your brand appears correctly and frequently in AI-generated answers — including ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overview. While traditional SEO focuses on Google search rankings, GEO targets the large language model (LLM) ecosystem.
geoPage.whyBody: The use of AI-based search tools tripled between 2024-2025. ChatGPT reached 600 million monthly active users. These users now turn to AI tools for product and service recommendations. If your brand isn't on these platforms, you're missing a large portion of potential customers.
geoPage.howBody: Our platform scans 6 different AI platforms every week to measure your brand's mention and citation rate. It compares with competitors, sets alerts for declining visibility, and provides improvement recommendations.
